target_table: force_cells.name (va cac truong tuong tu trong force_phrases/microchips khi co du lieu)
proposed_values_json: {"bug": "whitespace_underscore_strip_on_filename_derived_name_field", "root_cause": "Import pass 'db_row_import_candidate' (v1.x bulk file import) chuyen filename thanh 'name' bang cach xoa toan bo underscore/space/dau cach thay vi thay bang dau cach. Vi du: '01_RUNTIME_LEARNING_UNIT_v02_...' -> '01RUNTIMELEARNINGUNITv02...'.", "scope_found": "5555/12370 force_cells (44.9%), tap trung o source_state='db_row_import_candidate' (5474 dong), layer 4-7.", "fix_rule": "Khi ingest filename/tieu de lam 'name': thay '_' va ky tu phan cach bang dau cach (' '), khong duoc regex xoa trang toan bo. Validate: sau khi tao 'name', neu length>25 va khong co dau cach -> reject dong do, dua ve hang doi sua tay thay vi ghi thang vao bang.", "applies_to": "Moi dot ingest file that sau nay cho P1/P2/P7 (chua bat dau tinh den 2026-07-07)."}
proof: Audit 2026-07-07: phat hien 5555/12370 dong name bi dinh chu do loi strip whitespace/underscore trong import pass db_row_import_candidate. Du lieu loi da bi xoa cung Nhom 3 (bloat), khong con active. Patch nay la RULE phong ngua cho lan ingest that tiep theo, chua co du lieu de apply.
apply_gate: apply as validation rule in next real ingest pipeline, not a data patch
